title: Chapter 354
content:

Jax immediately raised an eyebrow. "What exactly do you think you are doing?"

She turned her head toward him, proudly holding up a copper bottle. "I am doing exactly what you told me. Pouring water to make my... umm... weapon wet. Do not worry, I have plenty. So once I am finished I will lend you the rest. That way we do not need to leave this domain just to go searching for water."
